title: caladenia necrophylla
intro: Caladenia necrophylla, also known as the corpse lily or graveyard spider orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to Australia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its extracts exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Caladenia necrophylla include its potential use in treating wounds and infections due to its antibacterial properties. However, I couldn't find any specific information on herbal preparations or traditional uses of this plant.
